comment: Österreichische Druckschrift: M has 4 strokes. Stroke 1: left vertical top→bottom. Stroke 2: left diagonal from top-left down to the valley center. Stroke 3: right diagonal from valley center up to top-right. Stroke 4: right vertical top→bottom. The two diagonals meet at the bottom center.

strokes.comment: Left diagonal: from top-left down to valley center-bottom
Right diagonal: from valley center-bottom up to top-right
